---
title: "Blog listing"
description: "News, tips, and commentary on Python, open source, data science, and AI from Carol Willing."
subtitle: News, tips, and commentary from Willing Consulting
listing:
  contents: posts
  image-height: 200px
  image-placeholder: "../static/images/wave-connecting-250.png"
  date-format: iso
  feed: true
  filter-ui: true
  sort-ui: true
  sort: "date desc"
  categories: false
---
